documents.title: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification for Gabbard's Director of National Intelligence role. Marks standard certification sections for ethics-agreement obligations, including resignations, divestitures, transaction reporting, recusals and ethics briefing.

documents.title: Certificate of Divestiture
documents.summary: OGE-issued Certificate of Divestiture OGE-2025-051 providing tax-deferral treatment for a qualifying divestiture. Document content is not publicly downloadable from the OGE portal; available via Form 201 request.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement for Director of National Intelligence.

documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Nominee 278 form for Director of National Intelligence position.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Verified against ProPublica's appointee page for Tulsi Gabbard. ProPublica's page embeds 2 unique DocumentCloud disclosure documents; Open Cabinet may list additional OGE-indexed ethics, compliance, certificate, waiver, or request-only records that ProPublica does not expose as separate DocumentCloud PDFs. No contradictory filing record was identified in this check.
